title: AI-RSE Agentic Workflow State
description: Schema for the agentic workflow state file that governs agent autonomy boundaries.

current_release.description: The semantic version of the current release being worked on.

current_phase.description: The current TDD or governance phase.

track.description: Which development track this release belongs to.

adr_id.description: The ADR governing this release, if any.

branch.description: The git branch for this release.

allowed_paths.description: File or directory paths the agent is authorized to create or modify.

forbidden_paths.description: File or directory paths the agent must never modify without human approval.

forbidden_terms.description: Terms or regex patterns that must not appear in new code or documentation as affirmative claims.

required_skills.description: Agent skills that must be read and activated for this release.

required_checks.description: Validation checks that must pass before the agent can request human review.

human_approval_required_for.description: Actions that require explicit human approval. Must always include merge_pr, create_tag, and accept_adr.

next_allowed_actions.description: Actions the agent is currently authorized to perform autonomously.

blocked_actions.description: Actions the agent is explicitly prohibited from performing.

budget.description: BudgetOps constraints governing cost, token, and resource limits.
